nasb.text: As for the agreement of which you and I have spoken, behold, the Lord is between you and me forever.”

esv.text: And as for the matter of which you and I have spoken, behold, the Lord is between you and me forever.”

cnv.text: 至於你我之間所說的這事，有耶和華永遠在你我之間作證。”

ccb.text: 至于我们之间所立的约，耶和华永远为我们作证。”
